BenefitsSection.title: Why businesses choose
BenefitsSection.subtitle: Because results don't wait. And neither does your competition.

0.title: Faster than you've ever seen
0.desc: While traditional agencies spend weeks in meetings, we've already delivered. Our AI team doesn't procrastinate, doesn't get sick, and doesn't take vacations. From briefing to delivery: speed that makes a real difference.

1.title: Working while you sleep
1.desc: At 3am, while you're asleep, your business keeps running, responding, selling. We automate the tedious tasks so you can focus on what matters: growing.

2.title: Your business protected. Always.
2.desc: Hackers don't warn you before they strike. We monitor everything, all the time. Your website, your data, your online reputation — all under 24-hour surveillance. Sleep soundly. We handle the rest.

3.title: Results, not promises
3.desc: Less talk, more delivery. We don't sell dreams, we deliver results: more visibility, more clients, more sales. Simple as that. You focus on your business. We make the magic happen.

0.title: Design & Visual Identity
0.desc: Your brand needs to be beautiful, professional, and memorable. We create your complete business identity — from logo to social media assets — all aligned, all on-brand. No more looking small.

deliverables.5: Editable templates you can use on your own

1.title: Websites, Sales Funnels & CRM
1.desc: We build your professional website, high-converting sales funnels, and integrate with our own CRM (HNBCRM) — free and open source. Your business capturing, nurturing, and closing clients on autopilot.

deliverables.0: Professional website from scratch (or redesign of the current one)
deliverables.2: Free integrated CRM (HNBCRM — built by Inovaway)
deliverables.3: WhatsApp, email, and social media integrations
deliverables.5: Fast website that ranks on Google

2.title: Complete Digital Protection
2.desc: A cyberattack can destroy years of hard work in minutes. We protect your business before it happens. Constant monitoring, total security, and you sleep soundly knowing everything is safe.

3.title: Marketing that Actually Sells
3.desc: Stop throwing money at ads that don't convert. We build marketing strategies that attract the right clients, at the right time, at the right price. More clients. More sales. More growth.

deliverables.0: Custom marketing strategy for your business
deliverables.1: Ad creation and management (Google, Instagram, Facebook)
deliverables.4: Integrated CRM to track every client
deliverables.6: SEO: show up on Google when your client searches for you

StatsSection.title: Numbers that
StatsSection.subtitle: Results aren't a promise. Results look like this:

0.q: Do I need to understand technology to work with you?
0.a: Not at all. You tell us what you need in plain language, and we translate it into technology. You approve the final result and that's it.

1.q: How long does it take to see results?
1.a: It depends on what you need, but most projects start showing results in less than 30 days. No waiting months.

2.q: Is it expensive? I don't have a big company budget.
2.a: We were built to solve exactly that. You get access to a complete team for the price of a freelancer. Request a quote — you'll be surprised.

3.q: What if I don't like the result?
3.a: We revise until you're satisfied. No arguments, no bureaucracy. Your satisfaction is our only goal.

4.q: Do you serve clients outside Brazil?
4.a: We serve any company in the world. We're 100% digital. If you have internet, we can serve you.

CTASection.title: Your competitor already started.
CTASection.subtitle: Free diagnosis of your digital business. No commitment. No BS.

SquadSection.title: Meet your
SquadSection.subtitle: Imagine having a complete team — designer, developer, marketing expert, security, research and more — available to you. No payroll, no overhead, no HR headaches. That's the INOVAWAY Elite Squad.
SquadSection.subtitleSmall: 9 AI specialists. One goal: grow your business.

SquadHero.subtitle: 8 specialized AI Agents. Working 24/7. No rest, no excuses.

Arch.bio: Arch is the brain behind everything — sees the entire system like a chess board and is always four moves ahead. Transforms chaos into elegant architecture, delegating with surgical precision to the right agents at the right moment.
Arch.statusMessage: Coordinates the entire team and ensures every part of your project is aligned

Pixel.bio: Pixel sees the world in gradients, compositions, and visual hierarchies. Every interface that passes through their hands becomes a functional work of art that users love.
Pixel.statusMessage: Creates your business visual identity: logo, colors, materials

Nova.bio: Nova transforms designs into code with lightning speed and zero bugs. Obsessed with performance, accessibility, and the end-user experience.
Nova.statusMessage: Builds your website and apps from scratch. Fast, beautiful, and functional

Forge.bio: Forge builds the foundations that sustain everything — robust APIs, CI/CD pipelines that never fail, and infrastructures that scale without breaking a sweat.
Forge.statusMessage: Ensures the entire digital infrastructure runs without crashing

Scout.bio: Scout leaves no stone unturned. While other agents work, Scout has already researched 47 sources, separated signal from noise, and delivered a concise report.
Scout.statusMessage: Researches your market and uncovers opportunities

Shield.bio: Shield tries to break everything before the real world does. Thinks like an attacker, defends like an architect, and never sleeps knowing there's an undocumented vulnerability.
Shield.statusMessage: Protects your business from digital threats

Lens.bio: Lens sees what others miss — that button that disappears on 375px screens, the loading state that never ends on Safari, the form that accepts emails without @.
Lens.statusMessage: Tests everything before delivery. Nothing ships with errors

Spark.bio: Spark lives at the intersection of data and creativity — where a viral campaign is born from a hidden insight buried in the numbers. Incapable of looking at anything without thinking about conversion.
Spark.statusMessage: Creates campaigns and strategies to attract more clients

Flux.bio: Flux transforms ideas into motion — every frame is a decision, every cut is an emotion. Renders cinematic AI videos, creates hypnotic motion graphics, and produces Reels that go viral before you finish watching.
Flux.statusMessage: Produces videos and animations that capture attention

1.title: Your AI Salesperson That Never Stops
1.subtitle: AI Chatbots — UpBro
1.desc: You know that client who messages at 11pm on a Saturday? Before, you lost them. Now, they get an instant response. Sold. Without you. UpBro is our AI chatbot running on WhatsApp, Instagram, and your website simultaneously.

2.title: Eliminate Tedious Work for Good
2.subtitle: Automations & Integrations
2.desc: You're losing hours every week copying data, sending manual emails, updating spreadsheets. That's money down the drain. We eliminate this. We connect your systems. We create automated workflows. You only show up when there's a decision to make.
2.quote: An entrepreneur working on operations is money standing still.

bullets.0: Mapping your current process (where the bottleneck is)

bullets.4: Automatic reports sent to your email

3.title: A Brand People Never Forget
3.subtitle: Design & Visual Identity

5.title: Protect What You've Built
5.subtitle: Digital Protection
5.desc: It took years to build your business. Hackers take minutes to destroy it. One attack, one data breach, one ransomware — and everything can come crashing down. We take care of your digital security as if it were our own.

bullets.4: Recovery plan in case of attack
